name: Rights Rights Checker to boost engagement
description: Rights Rights Checker to boost engagement classifies transcripts and classifies audience segments; applies decision gates and observability; orchestrates via Recommendation Engine to ensure brand safety.

steps.name: Series Intake
steps.description: Collect, validate and normalize metadata from CDP; attach a runId and timestamp for traceability.

steps.name: Retrieve
steps.description: Execute retrieve phase for the RAG pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Ground
steps.description: Execute ground phase for the RAG pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Recommendation
steps.description: Recommendation across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Rights Validation
steps.description: Rights Validation across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Content Classification
steps.description: Content Classification across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Audience Targeting
steps.description: Audience Targeting across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Programming Grid
steps.description: Assemble final payload with status, artifacts, KPIs and audit trail; store to Recommendation Engine; return response JSON for the client.
